In translating بائن بينونة كبرى  as ‘big baena divorce’ the term بائنة baen’  is translated by using

evidence.clean_text: Translators of documents 4 & 6 have used the borrowing translation procedure within the direct translation strategy since the same Arabic word of شرعي shar’i’, which is written in English alphabets is used.
